_about: READ-ONLY schema baseline for critical dispatch_state files. Consumed by tools/validate_state_schema.py to detect structural drift (missing required keys, wrong container shape). This file does NOT mutate live state; the live files are dict-of-entries (or a flat wrapper) iterated by readers, so we validate shape only. required_keys = the CORE keys readers depend on, NOT the full superset (lifecycle-only keys like delivered_at/picked_up_at are intentionally excluded to avoid false-positive drift on fresh entries).
